title: Odisha UG Admissions 2026

detail.title: Odisha UG Admissions 2026
detail.short_info: Odisha UG Admissions 2026 online application is now open through SAMS portal. Last date to apply is 10 June 2026 for BA, B.Sc, B.Com and other undergraduate courses. Apply at samsodisha.gov.in.

content.text: The online application process has started from 27 May 2026. Students can begin submitting their applications online from today, 27th May 2026 through the SAMS portal at samsodisha.gov.in. The last date to apply is 10 June 2026.

Odisha UG Admissions 2026 is conducted by the Student Academic Management System (SAMS), Department of Higher Education, Government of Odisha for admission into +3 (Undergraduate) Degree courses in various colleges across the state. The admission is based on merit and choice filling through the Common Application Form (CAF).

sections.heading: Important Dates for Odisha UG Admissions 2026
Courses Offered in Odisha UG Admissions 2026

content.text: Students can begin submitting their applications online from today, 27th May 2026 for various undergraduate programmes including BA, B.Sc, B.Com, BBA, BCA and other streams in Arts, Science, Commerce and self-financing courses offered by government and private colleges affiliated to different universities in Odisha. The portal allows students to select multiple course preferences during choice filling.

Students can begin submitting their applications online from today, 27th May 2026. Candidates who have passed Class 12 (10+2) or equivalent examination from a recognized board are eligible to apply. Specific eligibility may vary as per the course and stream chosen. Students must ensure they meet the minimum marks requirement as prescribed for different categories and subjects.

Students can begin submitting their applications online from today, 27th May 2026. The application fee is to be paid online through the SAMS portal. Exact fee details for different categories (General, SC, ST) are available on the official portal during the application process.

sections.heading: How to Apply for Odisha UG Admissions 2026

items: Click on the UG Admission 2026 link.
Complete registration using valid mobile number and email.
Fill the online application form with personal and academic details.
Submit the form and take a printout.

content.text: Apply Online Link: Apply for Odisha UG Admission 2026

items: A valid mobile number and email ID.
